title: Bored Aiko
body: _[English]_ ## **Note: After version 1.1.20260426, the data pack has been changed to a resource pack (a combination of texture pack and data pack). The data pack is only applicable to the last DEMO version — [Link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/h3PeiHjb/versions/JaqLqE6a/ITS%201.20.1.jar?mr_download_reason=standalone)** *After learning about Aiko's murder, you avenged her, and then everything came to an end. Later, when the news reached Aiko, who had regained all her memories, she was a bit reluctant to leave "you". "Thank you for everything you've done. We're still friends. Can I... stay with you a little longer?" "You" agreed, and then "you" took Aiko to a server. Afterwards, Aiko met many friends and she was very happy.* #### **This data pack provides some features for the mod "Inside the System", making survival with Aiko more interesting** ### **The features currently added to this data pack are:** * **Added self-created chat texts by the author (some texts are interactive)** * **You just need to look up to have your beloved Aiko sent to your side, without worrying about losing them.** ![Aiko Teleportation Demonstration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c5a591b5cc5782ca84d6c97592648e8933e5e7ee.gif) * **House building feature: Aiko has her own small house and her own chest (Aiko will ask you to build a house after surviving for a certain period of time)** * **Aiko will upgrade her equipment as she survives longer** * **Achievements (though very few)** * **Added one item (an easter egg photo)** * **Command book (named "Letter")** * **Aiko can now use guns (requires installation of Timeless and Classics: Zero). Currently, Aiko can currently use the following guns:** - Accuracy International AWM - HK-MP5A5 - AKM - Golden Deagle 357 ![Give Aiko an ammo demonstration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3bc2d3f95fbf501dceb05513d6804311aa29b79c.gif) ![Give Aiko a gun demonstration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51c0edab4246925f8a4c77f2a806bf13d439ab49.gif) * **Safety module designed to prevent players from being harmed by arrows and gun bullets (enabled by default; can be disabled by entering the command "function inside_the_system_boring_aiko:commands/settings/security/n")** ### **Planned future updates:** * **More interactive chat texts (the command book will also allow players to chat with Aiko about more topics)** * **More items (items from the official version of "Internal System" and some meme images created by the community)** * **More achievements** * **Support for more types of guns** * **Hide and Seek game** **This data pack supports multiplayer gameplay (including servers)** **If you support this data pack, you can feedback errors and provide suggestions via my "Wiki" link (which is actually the video link on my Bilibili homepage... ) or email xiaohang_o@outlook.com.** *Although the author is very busy, please feel free to give more suggestions if possible : )* *Wish you a good time with Aiko! ;)* _[中文]_ ## **注意 : 1.1.20260426 版本之后数据包变更为资源包（材质包与数据包二合一），数据包只适用最后一次DEMO版——[链接](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/h3PeiHjb/versions/JaqLqE6a/ITS%201.20.1.jar?mr_download_reason=standalone)** *知道了爱子被杀的事情之后，你为她报仇，之后一切都结束了，后来音讯传到爱子后，恢复全部记忆后的爱子却有点不想和“你”离开，“谢谢你做出的一切，我们还是朋友，我可以...再和你陪一会吗？”，“你”同意了，之后“你”把爱子带到了一个服务器上，爱子在之后结识了许多朋友，她很开心。* #### 本数据包为模组 "內部系统" 提供了一些功能，让你与爱子一起生存变得更加有趣 ### 本数据包现添加的功能有： * **添加了作者自创的聊天文本（一些文本还可以交互）** * **只需抬头就可让爱子传送到你身边，不用怕爱子不见了** * **房子搭建功能，爱子也有自己的小房子，也有自己的箱子（爱子生存到一定时间后会询问你搭建房子）** * **爱子会随着自己生存越久升级自己身上的装备** * **成就（虽然很少）** * **添加了一个物品（一张彩蛋照片）** * **指令书（名为“信封”）** * **爱子现在可以用枪了（需要安装永恒枪械工坊：零），爱子目前可以使用以下枪械 :** - 精密国际 AWM 狙击步枪 - HK MP5A5 冲锋枪 - AKM 突击步枪 - .357 黄金沙漠之鹰 * **为了避免玩家箭矢和枪械子弹伤害而做的安全模块（默认开启，可通过输入指令“function inside\_the\_system\_boring\_aiko:commands/settings/security/n”来关闭）** ### **未来将更新的计划 :** * **更多可交互的的聊天文本（指令书也可让玩家与爱子聊更多的话题）** * **更多物品（“內部系统”正式版中的物品，一些圈子制造的梗图）** * **更多成就** * **更多的枪械支持** * **躲猫猫游戏** **本数据包支持多人游戏使用（包括服务器）** **如果你支持这个数据包可以我的“Wiki”链接（其实就是我哔哩哔哩主页的视频链接 [ :( ] ）或邮箱 xiaohang\_o@outlook.com 来反馈错误与提供建议.** *虽然作者很忙，但如果可以的话多提提一些建议 : )* *祝你和爱子玩的开心！;)*
